pericopes.title: Mit tah a Christa loupina kimu
Themgao lhemho le mihil lhem ho @9(Jude 4-13)@7@7

chapters.text: Jesu Christa soh le solchah Simon Peter in i-Pathenu le i-Huhhinguva Jesu Christa chonphat vanga tahsan lu tah kachan bang chang ho heng’ah;
Pathen le i-Pakaiyu Jesu hetna a konin nachunguva lungset le lungmon hapunin pung hen.
Ajeh chu aloupina le aphatna a eikoupau ama chu hettoh vanga Pathen thahat chun hinna le Pathen ngaisahna lam thudol’a thil jouse eipeh-u ahitai;
chule hicheng vanga chu thutep len chungnung lu tah chu eipeh jengu ahitai; hitia chu ngaichat’a kona um vannoi losoh kemtheiya kona chu nahoidoh uva; Pathen nun le khan chankhompi nahina dingu ahi.
Hichejeh tah chun nangho ponthona kimkei pandoh-in natahsanu chun phatna, naphatnau chun lungthim them;
nalungthim themu chun tibah timthem, natibah timthemu chun thoh hat, chule thoh hat chun Pathen ngaisahna;
Pathen ngaisahna chun sopi hepina, chule sopi hepina chun ngailutna sodoh hen.
Ajeh chu hichengse chu nanghoa auma dimset jinga ahile, i-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa hetna thudol’a nangho thasea le ga beiya umsah lou ding ahi.
Ijeh ham itile hicheng neilou chu amitchoa ahi; gamla mulou ahin, masanga achonset chengse kisuh bei chu asumilji tan ahi.
Hijeh chun sopite ho, nangho nakikounau le nakilhen nau chu kichetsahna dingin kihabol’un; hiti chun bolleu chun imatih chanin lhupouvin nate;
chutia chu i-Pakaiyu chule Huhhinga Jesu Christa tonsot um jing gama chu lut theina thu letsettah a nakipeh dingu ahi.
Hichejeh a chu nanghon hicheng hi he jong leu chun, chule tua nanghoa uma thutah a chun umdet jing jong leu chun, keiman hicheng thudol hi nangho geldohsah jing dinga kigodema um jing ding kahi.
Chule hiche pon in’a hi kaum laichansea nangho chu geldohsah jinga hah jinga umsah hi adih lam hin kagel’e.
Ajeh chu i-Pakaiyu Jesu Christa’n eihetsah banga hiche pon in hi kadalhah vah ding ahi, ti kahei.
Chule kapotdoh nung teng le hicheng thudol hi nageldoh jing theina dinguva jong kahabol ding ahi.

Keiman Pakai Jesu Christa thunei thahat le ahung ding thu nangho kahetsah laiya chu, lungthim thema suhtoa semthu thusim juiya hilou kahi, Leng chungnung loupitah ahije mit tah a mua hettohsahjoa kahibouve.
“Ama hi ka-Chapa deitah ahi, achunga kalung alhaita ngeiye,” tia Leng chungnung loupina a ahenga o ahung lhun a chu Pa Pathena kona choiat le jabol changa ahi.
Vana kon hiche o chu mol theng chunga kaumuva keiho tah aja a kahiuve.

Chule themgaoho thu chu akichet chehna a kahengu hung lhunga ahi; nangho chuche thua lung luttah a naumu hi apha lheh jenge; hichu sun khovah kipat kahsea jing valpa chu nalung sunguva asodoh kahsea muthim lah chu salvah jing jeng meivah tobang ahi.
Pathen lekhabua thusoh ding kisei hi aseiyan ama chang lunga aledoh ahilchet dol ahipoi;
Ajeh chu thusoh ding chu mihem lung chama konin asoh khapoi; miho chu Lhagao Thengin asotlea Pathena kona amu chanu aseijiu ahibouve.

Ahin miho lah a themgao lhem asodoh tah banga chu nangho lah a jong mihil lhem hung sohdoh a guhthima mi suhmangna thuhil lam dang ahinpoh lut dingu, amaho achopau Pakaitah jeng jong chu ajahda dingu, chule poh phunga amaho tah manthahna akiso dingu ahi.
Chule mi tamtah-in huhna lama athil bol’u chu ahinjui dingu; amaho jeh a chu thutah lampi hi seiset taitoma hung um ding ahi.
Chule kiloset na a nahin nei dingu ahi; ahinla malaiya pat’a achunguva thu kitan chu khongai sot lou, chule amanthah nau jong chu lulhu lou ahi.
Ajeh chu Pathenin Vantil chonse ho jeng bon chu khen louhel’a damuna ale lut jenga athu u kitan ding ngah a kokhuh thima akhum jeng ahin;
chule Pathen ngasah lou vannoi chunga twisang aletsah a chu vannoi lui chu khen louhel’adang sagi toh chonphat thu seilea Noah chubou akhen ahi.
Chule Sodom le Gomorrah khopi ni vutvai asosah a chu Pathen ngaisah louho chunga itobang ahung chuh ding vetkahsahna a asema themmo achan a asuhmang jeng ahi;
chule mi engse ho huhbol khan gitlouna a kona thoh gentheiya michonpha Lot chu ahuhhingin ahi.
Hiche michonpha chu amaho lah a chenga achonset nau chu mua ja a, achonset jeh uva chu ama chonphat lung sunga chu niseh a lung phamo lhehjia ahi.
Pakai chun Pathen ngaisah ho chu lhepna a kona huhdoh je ahen chonphalou ho thupi kitan ni kahsea dinga talen matsah a koije ahei;

ahinla ahideh chu kisuhbohna lam ngaicha a tahsa lama chonte ho le gamvaipo nahsahmo ho ahiuve; amaho chu ngol han le ama lung chama chon ahiuve; amahon loupina chang ho jengsan jong houset atijapouve.
Vantil ho chu thahat le thilbol theiya chungnungjo ahi jeng vangun, achunguva oimoa housetna thu Pakai ang a lhut lou ahiuve.
Ahin hite ho vang hi lung gel neilou sahem ho banga achonnau dungjuiya kiman a kisumang ding ahiuvin, ahet phah louhel’u thu lam chu ahouseuve;

amaho manthah a mangthah ding ahiuvin, alam louva bol man a alam louva bol athoh dingu ahi; amahon sun a kivahva nehnop hi nomsahna a angaitou ahi; boh beh a nol uma ahiuve; kivahva a doha bolna a nangho toh an aneh khom adeijiuve;
amit’u jon dimset ahin, chonset tang theilou ahiuvin, mi lungdet louho ajol lha jiuve; alung chu thangset bol lama kichuh ahin, sapset chang chate ahiuve;
Lamdih dalha a lam hilouva vahmanga, thil dih lou bol’a sum lam ngailua, Be’or chapa Balaam lampi chu juiya ahiuve;
ahin ama chu achonkhel jeh chun phosal’in aumin ahi; pao theilou sangan chu mihem paova paodoh a themgaopa ngolna chu akhamtan ahi.
Hiti ho hi twi umlou twinah ahiuvin khopi hui semmang meilhang ahiuve; amaho dinga muthim lhangkhal kiheh chu kikheh jingsa ahi.
Ajeh chu amahon hamhoithona thu manlou aseiyuva lamvaina a um ho lah a kona hung jamdoh ho chu tahsa lam ngaichat huhna lama ajol lhah jiu ahi.
Amahon chamlen athu tep jiuve. Ahinla amaho tah kem mang soh ho ahiuve; ajeh chu ajoupa chun mi ajopa chu soh a akailutji ahi.
Pakai le huhhinga Jesu Christa het vanga vannoi leiset kisuhbohna tincheng ajamsan nunga, chuche thenlouna kikhit oh kit, joa uma chu aumchan amasa a sanga anununga sejocheh ahi.
Ajeh chu ahet nunguva amaho kipea thupeh thenga kona akihei mang sangun chonphat lampi chu ahet louhel’u hile amaho dinga phajoa ahi.
Uiyin aloh lhahsa ajon kitjin, vohpi kisilngimsa jong bonlhoh lah a akibol’in akilejie, ti pao chamtuh hi amaho chunga lhung ahitai.
Ngaitah te ho keiman nangho lekha kahin thot hiche hi an ina ahi; ani gel’a chu nangho geldohsah a nalung thengu chu kahinsuh thouna ahi;
nanghon malai ya themgao theng ho thusei chengse le solchah ho kama kona Pakai le Huhhinga thupeh najahsau chu nageldoh jingna dinguva kahinsut ahi.
Amasan nanghon hiche hi heuvin, ni nunung le jon taina manga jontai hatte ho hung umdoh ding ahiuve, amaho chu ama ama tahsa ngaichat lama chonun tin,
ahung ding athutep hoiba ham? Iputeu ipateu athiuva kipat tu gei hin, thilsem jouse hi la semtil’a aum ngai bang bangin aum nan, atiuva nahin jontai dingu ahi.
Ajeh chu amahon alung chamuva hiche hi asuhmil’u ahi, malaipeh a pat a Pathen thusah a van ho chengse le twi lah a kona twitoh umhal leiset uma ahia;
chuchea chulai van hole vannoi leiset chu twisanglenin asuhmang ahi.
Hiche thu ma ma a chu tulai vannoi leiset hi Pathen ngaisah louho thu kitan le akisuhmang niu geiya dinga kikheh meiya dinga kikhol khoma ahi, ti hi.
Ahin sopi ngaite ho, nanghon hiche thu hi sumil loujenun, Pakai dingin ni khat chu kum sang tobang ahin, kum sang khat chu ni khat tobang ahi.
Mi khattouvin geisang asah chu Pakai athutep lamdol’a geisang ahipoi, koima amangthah um louva mi jousen lung aheimanna dinga angaitoa, nangho jal’a kho-ngai sot ahibouve.

Amavang Pakai nikho chu gucha banga hung ding ahi; hiche ni chule van ho chengse ha gin a ginglul lul’a, mang hel ding ahi, chule thilbul chengse meiyin akahjol’a kavama gamhel ding ahi; chule vannoi leiset le asunga thil um jouse aboncha kavam sohkei ding ahi.
Chu chengse chu chutia mang ding ahile, nun le khan then lam le Pathen ngaisahna lama itobang mi nahi ding dol’u ham!
Pathen nikho hung lhung ding chu ponthotah a kat jinga kinema um ding dol ahi; hiche ni chu ahung lhun jeh a van ho meiya konga kavamhel ding, chule thilbul chengse meisa a jolmangsoh ding ahi.
Ahinla eihon vang ama thutep dungjuiya vanthah ho le leithah kinema ingau ahi; hichea chu chonphat chenga ahi.
Hijeh chun sopi ngaite ho, hicheng chu kat jinga nangho ama ang a boh beh louhel le nolna beihel’a lung monga nakimu doh theina dingun kihabol’un;
Chule Pakai mi kho-ngai sot hi huhhinga umna ahi ti gel’un; isopiu deitah Paul jongin ama kipea hetna dungjuiya chutobangma chu nangho henga ahinsutsa ahitai.

Alekha thot chengsea chu hiche thu chu aseiya chutobangma chu asut ahi, hichenga chun het hahsatah tah thu aume; hichu mi lung lhom hole lung det louhon Pathen lekhabua thu dang dang angai koiji bangun angai koijiuvin ama le ama akisumang jiuve.
Hijeh chun ngaite ho, hichengse chu he masauvin lang kihongphauvin, achuti lou le michonse ho lamvaina lama puimangin umun natin napandet phapet lhaso khauvin nate.
Ahin i-Pakaiyu le Huhhinga Jesu Christa milungset le hetna a khangtou jingun, tu le tonsot geiyin loupina ama a um hen, Amen.
